reviews.review_description: I found the login straight forward. This is powerful stand alone software. Intuitive and amazing. Really worth checking out!

reviews.review_title: Won't let me log in on the quest
reviews.review_description: Can't log in on the quest at all only on my phone wtf ........
Where the HELL is the part where I have put the code like WHY???
in the vr app there is a mistake in the link to the activation page. it should be:m….studiodotcom/activate

I can get as far as the creation part in the VR but once I get into the VR it says I have to do an activation code in order to get any further for 250 points cannot find for the life of me how to put the activation code in and can't bypass the screen so it's all totally useless I'm deleting the app maybe you guys can figure it out but I'm not wasting anymore hours of my life trying to figure this out you think that would at least be a bypass or something

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, and we’re sorry for the trouble. Could you please email us at support@masterpiecestudio.com so we can solve this issue?

reviews.review_description: Love and hand interactions with speaking with people and AI girlfriend

reviews.review_title: Amazing program for a low cost
reviews.review_description:
I  get that the sign up thing can be a little frustrating, but it's well worth it. You get acess to a browser system on your computer or phone which helps you organize and set up files. This software gives you the ability to freaking generate 3d AI models! You can also import stuff so you can use other AI generators that are free like Meshy and Lumalabs Genie to make models and refine them here too. It has bone rigged animation which is wild with predone poses too. And most importantly it can run without being plugged into a computer unlike say ShapeLabs which is a direct sculpting competitor.  I can just take my headset and have everything I need to make sculpts I can sell. Thus far my sculpts have kept pace with Shapelabs'. The interface is pretty intuitive and there are plenty of Youtube tutorials. I'll have to try it on the quest 3 and see if I see it run any different than my 2. Good work y'all. 
Update: I can't load anything now with this app I just get a broken android load page. I was counting on this app for my personal business and to teach others. Now I hate it. They shut off all their youtube comments on their channel too which can't be a good sign.
Update2: Tried reinstalling it and it's been days still nothing. If others are experiencing this then this app should be removed from the store as it's payment for nothing.

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Sorry to hear you're having trouble! We've made upgrades, so hopefully, this works better for you.

Also, if you grabbed our VR app between Dec 14 and Mar 6, peek in your inbox for a surprise from us!

Still stuck or have questions? Shoot us an email at support@masterpiecex.com, and we'll help you out ASAP. We’re here to make things right.

Thanks,
The Masterpiece X Team

reviews.review_title: Easy to and is super fun!
reviews.review_description: This tool makes 3d object and character creation fun and easy for everyone. Plenty of great starter pieces to let your imagination run wild. Most of the items are pre rigged and you chose to autogenerate rigs or import your own. That's pretty sweet, and to top it all off you can use pre made animations or creation your own. Nice.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the support! 

We're really excited to see creators remixing 3D - lots more updates on the way!

reviews.review_description: I want to see in passthrough mode made with MR model

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback & support!

This is definitely something we're excited about supporting in the near future :) 

Stay tuned & happy remixing!

reviews.review_title: I'm adding this app to my workflow!
reviews.review_description: Super cool! This app makes you think differently about how to work with 3D.  Editing 3D objects by moving around and using spatial tools just makes more sense than using a flatscreen especially because I'm not formally trained. This tool is in my arsenal of creator tools. Thank you!!!! I've been following your team for a while.  Love this.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the support! 

This is only the beginning and we can't wait to see what you create & remix!

reviews.review_title: A really powerful tool for creators!
reviews.review_description:
I tried out Masterpiece X on my quest 2 and really liked the interface of it! Being newer to creating in VR, I went ahead and tried this tool out. I really appreciated the onboarding and tutorials to help get immersed. I do like that the advanced features are toggled off when first getting started but with the option to turn it back on when getting to learn the tool better. 

When creating, I do appreciate the library of pre-made models for inspiration and the easy controls to start creating!

I look forward to the library of models expanding and other features to be added to make building and creating even more fun!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the kind words!

We're driven to empower creators from all backgrounds to be able to create 3D effortlessly - and we're just getting started!

Can't wait to see what you create! Happy remixing!

reviews.review_title: Jumping through hoops to sign up? No.
reviews.review_description: Well I downloaded it went to play it found out I had to go put in a code on my phone and then tried to link it to my Facebook and it wouldn't and now the code is no good access denied blah blah blah deleted 🙄  so far it's good for wasting battery for nothing 🤷

developer_response.body:
Hi there,

Thanks for the feedback! 

This is something we're actively looking to improve - if there are any additional details about the experience you think might help, please send us an email directly: support@masterpiecex[.]com!

Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I signed in using Facebook now it's says access denied? Please help

developer_response.body:
Hey there! 

So sorry for the inconvenience, thanks for letting us know - we're looking into what might have caused this issue!

Please feel free to email us so that we can better help resolve the issue: support[@]masterpiecestudio.com - thank you!

reviews.review_description:
More of a model editor than a modelling app. It has pre fabricated polygon models and enables you to modify the shape, re paint them and play with the IK rigging. 
If you want a more professional app to build your own models, I recommend Gravity Sketch.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review! 

We're focused on enabling creators of all backgrounds to more easily explore lots of concepts and ideas via remixing. 

Stay tuned for more updates to support other ways of creating! In the meantime, happy remixing!

reviews.review_description: I was looking forward to this for long! I see still there are things that need to come. I didn’t find yet the way to import your own 3d objects, so you can continue editing and mixing here, that would be great!

developer_response.body:
Hi there! 
Importing will be available soon! In the meantime, we'd love to help! 
Please see this FAQ (https://support.masterpiecevr.com/hc/en-us/articles/16753724927885-How-do-I-import-3D-assets-) or send us an email directly: support[@]masterpiecex[.]com! Happy remixing!

reviews.review_description: Fine, except when I try to access my creations comes this message "error, cannot destructure property"

well I only got so far as to download the app on my oculus quest 2 and laptop, never got to use it though. My oculus says to sync the two by putting a code from my computer into my oculus, but my computer never gives me any code. My oculus wont let me past that step, so im just stuck. I was able to create a person on my laptop, but I cant do anything with her. I was super excited to try this, is it just me having this issue?

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, and we’re sorry for the trouble. Could you please email us at support@masterpiecestudio.com so we can solve this issue?
